title: Crucible Project Adapter
description: Binds the portable Enforcement Charter to one repository's real gate machinery.

charter.description: Repo-relative path to the Gate Ledger. Default .crucible/charter.json.

approvals.description: Repo-relative path to the append-only approvals log. Default .crucible/approvals.json.

command.description: How the required per-change gate is invoked, for humans.

file.description: Repo-relative gate-runner script to scan for wired checkers.

checkerPattern.description: Regex applied to the gate-runner file; capture group 1 is a wired checker's repo-relative path.

changeToUnits.description: How changed files map to build units (informational).

highRiskUnits.description: The money/checkout-critical build units where a silent test is catastrophic; drives highRisk blocking.

prePush.description: Repo-relative path to the pre-push enforcement hook.

pinnedConfig.description: Judge-config files (this adapter, mutation/acceptance recipes, mutation-waivers) whose combined fingerprint must be independently approved (crucible approve __config__), so enforcement cannot be weakened silently by emptying highRiskUnits, no-oping a recipe, or blanket-waiving mutants.
